results.title: Residents reclaim iconic Gqeberha beachfront park after years of neglect
results.description: Businesses and residents have launched a long-term campaign to restore Gqeberha’s Happy Valley after years of neglect turned the once-popular beachfront park into a symbol of municipal decline. Organisers hope sustained community action, backed by municipal support, can reclaim the space for residents and tourists alike.

results.title: Ryan Fox birdies 18th hole to cap comeback win at Open Championship
results.description: Ryan Fox emerged from the pack on the back nine at Royal Birkdale and sank an 11 1/2-foot birdie putt at No. 18 to win the 154th Open Championship.

results.title: Record-setting driver Michael Bilderback wins Big 8 at Hawkeye Downs
results.description: Michael Bilderback secured his second Big 8 Late Models Series win of 2026 at Hawkeye Downs Speedway, taking the lead early and holding off challengers in a 48-lap race, marking his first Series win at this track since 2016.

results.title: 'Keep an eye on this' - Everton Insider: Djed Spence move hinges on Nottingham Forest deal
results.description: Football Insider exclusive as Everton manager David Moyes applauds, while Tottenham defender Djed Spence is in action on the other side of a split image.

results.title: Calgary home owner, 28, says making a vision board allowed her to engineer her reality

results.title: Iowa climatologist: El Nino could cause warmest year ever
results.description: Glisan said there is an 81% chance there will be a very strong El Nino event, which could mean a warmer winter with less snowfall, followed by the potential for droughts and floods.

results.title: Costa Rica Eyes Argentina and Chile to Revive South American Tourism Slump
results.description: The post Costa Rica Eyes Argentina and Chile to Revive South American Tourism Slump appeared first on The Costa Rica News . The Costa Rican Tourism Board (ICT) is shifting its focus toward Argentina and Chile to re-energize the influx of South American travelers during the latter half of the year. This targeted initiative arrives as part of a broader tactical framework designed to reverse a recent slowdown in regional arrivals.
